title: Caen, Normandy — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Caen, Normandy: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Caen is a city in Normandy with a population of 108,000. A historic Norman city with a magnificent ducal castle, the Abbaye aux Hommes, and proximity to the D-Day beaches.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
